# mongo_document_db_driver

`mongo_document_db_driver` is the low-level MongoDB driver package used underneath the higher-level generated API.

Most app code should prefer:

- `MongoDbConnection.initialize(...)` from `mongo_document_annotation`
- generated CRUD from `mongo_document`

Start here:

- [README.md](README.md)
- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt)
- [example/README.md](example/README.md)

Key rules:

- prefer high-level wrappers unless you need direct low-level control
- the package expects a MongoDB URI
- use `modernFind` and `modernFindOne` when you want projection/sort/skip/limit as separate arguments
